commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c1d00bff21cc49db6de3f77fbea074b12460cfb5)
commands.review_summary:
The branch moves daily cache-miss generation into `DomainDO` with an in-memory in-flight map, stores fallback records, routes `/stream` through the same daily path, and updates docs/tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current `main` can generate outside the Durable Object on cold misses and uses the live streaming path, so concurrent edge misses can bypass a single DO-owned generation path. I did not run a live Cloudflare reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A maintainer needs to decide whether `/stream` may lose live streaming, and the contributor needs to add real behavior proof before merge.

target.title: [codex] Coalesce daily generation in Durable Object
target.body:
## Summary
- route cache misses through the per-host Durable Object get-or-create path
- coalesce concurrent daily misses with an in-memory in-flight promise keyed by version/date
- store deterministic fallback text when AI generation fails so requests do not retry forever
- make `/stream` use the same DO-coordinated daily path instead of bypassing generation coalescing
- harden failure handling for thrown or malformed DO responses, whitespace-only AI output, and slow upstream calls
- remove unsupported `stale-while-revalidate` Cache API claims and update docs for versioned keys

## Why
The README/spec promise one model call per host per UTC day, but the Worker generated outside the Durable Object on cold misses. Since Cloudflare edge cache is per data center, simultaneous cold misses could all see an empty DO record and independently call AI Gateway. The old `/stream` path had the same bypass and could retry forever on failure.

This also makes failure modes boring: if the DO lookup fails, the AI returns empty content, or the upstream call hangs too long, the Worker returns/cache/stores deterministic fallback text instead of serving `generation failed` or retrying indefinitely.

## Validation
- `pnpm check`
- `npx wrangler@4 deploy --dry-run`
target.author: vincent-peng

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
